message:
🐛 Fix auto-qa: suppress re-detection spam and auto-triage new issues (#254)

- Remove hourly "Re-detected" comment spam on duplicate open issues
- Add triage/accepted label to 5 issue types that were missing it
- Auto-assign Copilot on new issue creation so no human /triage needed

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
